raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The legislation establishes the nation’s first safety protocols in law for television and film workers.",
    "The bipartisan legislation reflects two years of negotiations between studios and labor representatives.",
    "The bill establishes clear, mandatory guidelines around the use of firearms and ammunition on productions.",
    "It establishes training requirements and safety standards for prop masters and armorers.",
    "The bill prohibits the use of live ammunition except in limited circumstances following safety rules and laws.",
    "The bill creates a five-year safety pilot program requiring any employer who receives a motion picture tax credit to hire an independent safety advisor.",
    "The independent safety advisor will conduct preproduction risk assessments and oversee safety practices and procedures in motion picture, television, and streaming productions."
  ]
}
```
